queue_item.action: Define a fail-closed deterministic replay contract that derives effective queue state from the canonical base snapshot plus completely discovered immutable queue-update records.

progress.verification: source and test artifacts committed; runtime execution not completed because the local runtime could not resolve github.com for a fresh checkout
progress.privacy_boundary: public repository metadata and abstract operational claims only

queue_item.handoff: M-008 should implement or obtain an exhaustive paginated repository tree adapter, produce a complete discovery manifest, and execute the M-006 discovery plus M-007 replay pipeline against the full queue-update corpus.

claim_state.observed: The canonical queue snapshot and later immutable queue-update records can represent different points in operational history.
claim_state.inferred: Current state must be derived by replay, not selected by whichever representation was fetched last.
claim_state.proposed: Promote only complete-discovery replay results as effective queue truth.
claim_state.superseded: ACTIVE_QUEUE.json alone as sufficient evidence of latest queue state.
claim_state.unresolved: Exhaustive connector-native repository tree pagination remains unavailable in this run.
